title: Totem & Stuff
description: Action & Stuff Inspired Transparent Totem Model.
body:
This Pack Wont Work On Vanilla Minecraft. You Must Use Hold My Items Animation Mod And If You Want To Change Totem Model In Game You Must Download Respackopts Mod

![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23a25019880c315acc125ca53855d1ee9f30631.png) --- This pack takes the Totem Of Undying beyond its usual look and gives it a fresh, translucent look, similar to the one in the “Action and Stuff” mod. Made By WinterS
